hmong.inverts_input_built_from_1_pmos_1_nmos: Inverts the input. Built from 1 PMOS + 1 NMOS (CMOS inverter).
hmong.output_high_only_when_both_inputs_are_: Output HIGH only when BOTH inputs are HIGH. NAND + NOT (6 transistors).
hmong.output_high_when_any_input_is_high_nor: Output HIGH when ANY input is HIGH. NOR + NOT (6 transistors).
hmong.universal_gate_2_series_nmos_2_paralle: Universal gate! 2 series NMOS + 2 parallel PMOS. All logic from NAND.
hmong.universal_gate_2_parallel_nmos_2_serie: Universal gate! 2 parallel NMOS + 2 series PMOS.
hmong.output_high_when_inputs_differ_key_for: Output HIGH when inputs differ. Key for adders. Uses ~8 transistors.
hmong.output_high_when_inputs_match_used_in_: Output HIGH when inputs match. Used in comparators.
hmong.data_table_a_b_q: Cov ntaub ntawv: A, B, Q
hmong.build_a_circuit_from_components_add_pa: Tsim ib lub circuit los ntawm cov khoom. Ntxiv cov khoom, ces simulate!
hmong.click_components_above_to_add_them: Nyem cov khoom saum toj kom ntxiv lawv
hmong.a_silicon_ingot_is_pulled_from_molten_: A silicon ingot is pulled from molten silicon by the Czochralski method at ~1414 °C.
hmong.the_ingot_is_sliced_into_thin_wafers_7: The ingot is sliced into thin wafers (~775 μm thick) by diamond wire saws.
hmong.a_thin_layer_of_sio_is_grown_on_the_wa: A thin layer of SiO₂ is grown on the wafer surface at ~1000 °C in an oxygen furnace.
hmong.uv_light_transfers_circuit_patterns_fr: UV light transfers circuit patterns from a mask to photoresist-coated wafers.
hmong.unwanted_material_is_removed_by_chemic: Unwanted material is removed by chemical (wet) or plasma (dry) etching.
hmong.dopant_atoms_are_shot_into_the_silicon: Dopant atoms are shot into the silicon at high energy to change its electrical properties.
hmong.metal_and_insulator_layers_are_deposit: Metal and insulator layers are deposited by CVD, PVD, or ALD techniques.
hmong.metal_interconnects_are_patterned_and_: Metal interconnects are patterned and polished flat. Multiple layers build the circuit wiring.
hmong.moore_s_law_graph_showing_transistor_c: Moore txoj cai graph qhia cov transistor naj npawb txij 1965 txog 2030
hmong.6_transistors_per_bit_2_cross_coupled_: 6 transistors per bit: 2 cross-coupled inverters + 2 access transistors. Used in CPU caches.
hmong.1_transistor_1_capacitor_per_bit_must_: 1 transistor + 1 capacitor per bit. Must refresh every ~64 ms. Used in main memory (RAM modules).
hmong.floating_gate_transistor_traps_charge_: The floating gate transistor traps charge. NOR: random access, used in firmware/BIOS.
hmong.series_connected_floating_gates_sequen: Series-connected floating gates. Sequential access but extremely dense. SSDs, USB drives, SD cards.
hmong.ferroelectric_capacitor_stores_charge_: The ferroelectric capacitor stores charge with residual polarization. Non-volatile + fast write. Used in smart cards, automotive.
hmong.voltage_amplifier_high_input_impedance: Voltage amplifier. High input impedance (∞ for ideal). Gain = -gₘRₓ. Inverts signal. Most common MOSFET amp.
hmong.voltage_buffer_gain_1_no_inversion_low: Voltage buffer. Gain ≈ 1 (no inversion). Low output impedance → good for driving loads. Also called source follower.
hmong.current_buffer_low_input_impedance_non: Current buffer. Low input impedance. Non-inverting. Wide bandwidth → good for RF applications.
hmong.bjt_voltage_amplifier_gain_g_r_inverts: BJT voltage amplifier. Gain = -gₘRᶜ. Inverts signal. Higher gain than MOSFET but lower input impedance.
hmong.amplifies_difference_of_two_inputs_rej: Amplifies the difference of two inputs. Rejects common-mode noise. Foundation of op-amps. CMRR typically >60dB.
hmong.band_gaps_between_0_5_and_3_5_ev_are_s: Band gaps between 0.5 and 3.5 eV are semiconductors.
hmong.extra_electrons_n_for_negative_charge_: Extra electrons = N for Negative charge carriers.
hmong.think_of_it_as_multiplication_1_1_1_ev: Xav txog nws zoo li multiplication: 1×1=1, txhua yam ntxiv=0.
hmong.carriers_recombine_at_the_junction_lea: Carriers recombine at the junction leaving fixed ions.
hmong.positive_gate_attracts_electrons_to_fo: The positive gate attracts electrons to form a channel.
hmong.forward_pushing_carriers_toward_the_ju: Forward = pushing carriers TOWARD the junction.
hmong.more_thermal_energy_more_electron_hole: More thermal energy = more electron-hole pairs.
hmong.nand_can_implement_not_and_or_everythi: NAND can implement NOT, AND, OR — everything!
hmong.pmos_nmos_work_as_a_complementary_pair: PMOS + NMOS work as a complementary pair.
hmong.speed_mobility_gaas_8500_vs_si_1400_cm: Speed ∝ mobility. GaAs: 8500 vs Si: 1400 cm²/Vs.
hmong.zener_diodes_are_designed_to_conduct_i: Zener diodes are designed to conduct in reverse!
hmong.boron_has_3_valence_electrons_1_fewer_: Boron has 3 valence electrons (1 fewer than Si).
hmong.in_cmos_one_transistor_is_always_off_b: In CMOS, one transistor is always OFF, blocking the current.
hmong.n_1_for_ideal_junction_n_2_for_recombi: n=1 for ideal junction, n=2 for recombination in the depletion region.
hmong.e_3_4_ev_allows_higher_voltage_operati: Eₗ = 3.4 eV allows higher voltage operation.
hmong.sum_a_xor_b_carry_a_and_b: Sum = A XOR B, Carry = A AND B.
hmong.higher_v_ce_widens_the_depletion_regio: Higher V_CE widens the depletion region into the base.
hmong.e_1_l_smaller_box_higher_energy_steps: E ∝ 1/L² — smaller box = higher energy steps.
hmong.telecom_lasers_use_ingaasp_quantum_wel: Telecom lasers use InGaAsP quantum wells for precise wavelength control.
hmong.dram_stores_bits_as_charge_on_a_tiny_c: DRAM stores bits as charge on a tiny capacitor — it leaks!
hmong.the_floating_gate_is_electrically_isol: The floating gate is electrically isolated by oxide layers.
hmong.l1_cache_needs_the_fastest_possible_ac: L1 cache needs the fastest possible access time.
hmong.it_s_a_buffer_unity_gain_impedance_tra: It's a buffer: unity gain, impedance transformation.
hmong.higher_gain_lower_bandwidth_a_bw_gbw_c: Higher gain = lower bandwidth. Aᵥ × BW = GBW = constant.

hmong.back_to_stem_lab: Rov qab mus rau STEM Lab
hmong.doping_silicon_with_phosphorus_n_type_: Doping silicon with phosphorus (n-type) or boron (p-type) is the foundation of every chip ever made. The PN junction is the building block of every diode + LED + solar cell + transistor.
hmong.challenge_graded_problems: Kev sib tw — cov teeb meem muab qhab nia
hmong.bias_a_transistor_calculate_band_gap_e: Bias a transistor, calculate the band gap energy, predict current vs voltage. AP Physics 2 + introductory EE problems with step-by-step feedback.
hmong.battle_head_to_head_circuit_duels: Sib ntaus — circuit sib tw ib leeg rau ib leeg
hmong.time_pressure_rounds_build_a_circuit_f: Time-pressure rounds: build a circuit faster than the timer. Tests whether semiconductor reasoning is automatic, not just recognized.
hmong.bardeen_brattain_shockley_invented_the: Bardeen + Brattain + Shockley invented the transistor at Bell Labs (1947); Nobel 1956. Moore's Law: transistor count doubles every ~2 years; held for 50+ years before slowing.
hmong.minimal_dopant_pure_semiconductor_high: Minimal dopant. Pure semiconductor — high resistivity.
hmong.some_carriers_introduced_typical_extri: Some carriers introduced. Typical extrinsic regime.
hmong.approaching_metallic_behavior_used_for: Approaching metallic behavior. Used for contacts.
hmong.adjust_dopant_concentration_temperatur: Adjust dopant concentration, temperature, material. Discrete 4-band regime. No score, no reveal.
